name: Arduino IoT Cloud
description: Arduino IoT Cloud is a platform for connecting, managing, and monitoring Arduino and third-party IoT devices. It organizes devices into 'things' with typed properties (variables) that sync between hardware and cloud, and provides dashboards for visualization and control.

auth.description: OAuth2 client credentials flow. Obtain a token via POST https://api2.arduino.cc/iot/v1/clients/token with client_id and client_secret. Pass the token as Bearer in the Authorization header.

capabilities.name: list_things
capabilities.description: List all things (logical device representations) in your Arduino IoT Cloud account with their properties and connection status.

capabilities.name: get_thing_properties
capabilities.description: Get the current values of all properties (variables) attached to a thing, such as sensor readings or switch states.

capabilities.name: update_property
capabilities.description: Write a new value to a thing's property, allowing you to remotely control a device by setting its variables.

capabilities.name: list_devices
capabilities.description: List all physical devices registered in your Arduino IoT Cloud account with their type, connection status, and linked thing.

capabilities.name: get_property_timeseries
capabilities.description: Retrieve historical time-series data for a property over a specified date range, useful for charting sensor data trends.

capabilities.name: manage_dashboards
capabilities.description: List, create, or update IoT dashboards that display widgets bound to thing properties for visualization and control.
